hero.description: Helping homeowners, landlords, and contractors reclaim their space with professional junk removal, light demolition, moving assistance, and construction cleanup. Tell us what you need and we'll see if we can help.

about.description: We're a local, family-owned junk removal and property cleanout company based in Florence, Alabama. We help homeowners, landlords, real estate agents, and contractors remove unwanted items, debris, and eyesores — so you can reclaim your space without breaking your back.

image.alt: Shoals Junk Pros professional cleanup crew

description: Shoals Junk Pros was founded by Trenton Hips, a hard-working local who saw a need for honest, reliable junk removal in the Shoals area. Trenton started the business because he noticed so many homeowners and landlords were overwhelmed by clutter — garages packed to the ceiling, attics full of stuff nobody wanted, old sheds falling apart in backyards.

His philosophy is simple: tell him what you need and he'll see if he can help. No job is too small, no mess too big. From a single piece of furniture to a full estate cleanout, Trenton and his team handle it with respect, hard work, and a commitment to leaving your property cleaner than they found it.
Today, Shoals Junk Pros serves Florence, Muscle Shoals, Sheffield, Tuscumbia, and the surrounding areas — helping the community reclaim their space one load at a time.

image.alt: Trenton Hips - Owner, Shoals Junk Pros

headline.suffix: — We'll See If We Can Help

description: Shoals Junk Pros offers a full range of junk removal, cleanout, light demolition, and hauling services. Whether you're a homeowner with a cluttered garage, a landlord needing a tenant cleanout, or a contractor with construction debris, we've got you covered.
We do the heavy lifting so you don't have to. Just point us at the pile and we'll make it disappear.

section.headline: What Our Customers Say
section.description: Hear from homeowners, landlords, and contractors who called Shoals Junk Pros to reclaim their space.
section.featured: Trusted Junk Removal Pros in the Shoals Area

testimonials.name: Linda M.
testimonials.text: My garage was so full I couldn't park my car. Trenton and his team came out, gave me a fair price, and had it cleaned out in a few hours. I can finally use my garage again!

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: I manage several rental properties and Shoals Junk Pros is my go-to for tenant cleanouts. Fast, reliable, and thorough every time.

testimonials.name: Jennifer K.
testimonials.text: Had a foreclosure property that needed a full cleanout before listing. Shoals Junk Pros handled everything professionally and quickly. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Mike T.
testimonials.text: I use them for construction debris haul-off on my renovation projects. They show up on time, work hard, and clean up after themselves. Great service.

testimonials.name: Trenton Hips
testimonials.text: I started this business because I believe in helping people. If you're overwhelmed by clutter, don't know where to begin, or just don't want to do the heavy lifting yourself — give me a call. Tell me what you need and I'll see if I can help. That's a promise.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Honest answers about our junk removal, cleanout, and hauling services.

items.question: What items do you haul away?
items.answer: We haul just about anything — furniture, appliances, electronics, yard waste, construction debris, old sheds, fencing, mattresses, toys, garage clutter, attic junk, basement storage, and more. Just tell us what you need and we'll see if we can help.

items.question: Do you offer free estimates?
items.answer: Yes! All estimates are free, no-obligation, and we never have hidden fees. We'll come to your property, look at what you need removed, and give you an honest price.

items.question: Do I need to sort or box anything before you arrive?
items.answer: Nope! That's what we're here for. You don't even have to climb through your attic or move heavy furniture. Just show us what you want gone and we'll handle the rest.

items.question: Do you do estate cleanouts?
items.answer: Yes, we provide compassionate and thorough estate cleanouts. We understand it can be a difficult time, and we work respectfully and efficiently to clear the property.

items.question: What kind of demolition do you do?
items.answer: We specialize in light demolition — old sheds, small structures, fences, decks, interior tear-outs for remodeling projects. We tear it down and haul it all away.

items.question: Do you handle permits for demolition?
items.answer: We can help guide you on what's needed, but permit requirements vary by city. We'll let you know what's required for your specific project.

items.question: Do you offer moving services?
items.answer: Yes — local moving help including furniture moving, loading trucks or pods, and unloading assistance. Perfect if you just need an extra set of hands for the heavy stuff.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We primarily serve Florence, Muscle Shoals, Sheffield, Tuscumbia, and the surrounding Shoals area. If you're just outside our main area, give us a call — we might still be able to help.

items.question: How fast can you come out?
items.answer: We pride ourselves on fast response. In most cases, we can schedule you within a few days — sometimes same-day depending on our current workload.

items.question: Do you work with landlords and property managers?
items.answer: Absolutely. We're the preferred junk removal partner for many property managers in the Shoals area. Tenant cleanouts, eviction cleanouts, and property turnovers are our specialty.

knowledgeCard.title: Still Have Questions?
knowledgeCard.description: Not sure if we can help with your specific situation? Just tell us what you need and we'll give you an honest answer.

No job is too small, no mess too big. From a single piece of furniture to a full estate cleanout, Trenton and his team handle it with respect, hard work, and a commitment to leaving your property cleaner than they found it.
